content.en:
From Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, when the major forces heard the wind and moved, Ye Tian had already entered the Battle Realm Tower.

When he was outside the Battle Realm Tower, he had already heard several Invincible Dao Ancestors talk about the situation inside the tower.

However, when you really step into the gate of the War Boundary Tower and enter the Battle Boundary Tower, you can't help but be shocked.

The rules here are very powerful, far more powerful than the outside world.

Even if he was already a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and his strength was even more than a half-step domain ancestor of the consummation level of the One Realm, he still couldn't compete with the rules here, and he couldn't exert even one percent of his strength.

Of course, this is not only true for him, but also for others to enter here.

Ye Tian mobilized and used it, and struck the void with his hand, but found that it was difficult to shake even the space here, let alone break the space.

And such a scene is almost impossible to happen in the outside world.

"The Battle Realm Tower is truly extraordinary! it is worthy of being the seventh-ranked holy relic in the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

Ye Tian commented secretly.

And when Ye Tian entered the Battle Realm Tower, the Eternal Dao Ancestor also followed closely and entered the Battle Realm Tower.

After stepping into the interior of the Battle Boundary Tower, Ye Tian knew through understanding that the Battle Boundary Tower was divided into layers. The Dao Ancestors from the First Heaven to the Nine Heavens were on the first floor, the half-step Domain Ancestors were on the first floor, and the Domain Ancestors and those supreme beings were on the first floor.

It's just that with Lin Tian's current strength, it is difficult to reach this level.

"If my cultivation can reach the Domain Ancestor level, I can enter the upper layer, but now, I can only enter the half-step Domain Ancestor level. However, with my current strength, even if I can enter the level where the domain ancestors are, I am afraid that I will not gain anything. Now my strength can be said to be very strong in the Half-Step Domain Ancestor Realm, and there are few half-step Domain Ancestors in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm whose strength is above me, and I may be able to get a huge opportunity in the Battle Realm Tower. "

Ye Tian said secretly.

At this time, the Eternal Dao Ancestor who followed Ye Tian into the Battle Realm Tower also appeared inside the Battle Realm Tower.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, this Battle Realm Tower is really extraordinary!"

After walking around, the Eternal Dao Ancestor couldn't help but be shocked.

At this time, Ye Tian and the Eternal Dao Ancestor both saw that in the middle of their layer, there were countless spaces, and each space had a fighting platform, and on one of the fighting platforms, there were two ordinary half-step domain ancestors fighting, and the battle had entered a white-hot stage.

And around the Dou Zhan Stage, there were many ordinary half-step domain ancestors and all things realm half-step domain ancestors watching these two ordinary half-step domain ancestors fight.

Even.

Among the onlookers, Ye Tian also found several half-step domain ancestors who returned to the One Realm.

Of course, the Wind Mountain Lord is also among them.

Of these half-step domain ancestors who were watching, only a small number of them were known by Ye Tian, and they were from the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and the rest of the half-step domain ancestors belonged to other forbidden realms.

"The Invincible Dao Ancestor who came in before said that there are other creatures in the Battle Realm Tower, and now it seems that many of these creatures' strength is above my strength. "

Eternal Dao Ancestor said.

His cultivation realm is just an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, and his strength is not high, in front of so many half-step domain ancestors, the eternal Dao ancestor is very self-aware.

"Half of these creatures have cultivated to the half-step domain ancestor level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and there are even half-step domain ancestor levels in the One Realm Realm, and there are many, many of them, and the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain are indeed very prosperous. "

Ye Tian said after observing it.

For example, in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, there were only more than five Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and around the Fighting Battle Platform, there were tens of thousands of Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors watching, even in the Divine Heaven Realm, there would not be so many Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

These Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors must have come from the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and I am afraid that only a few of them came here like him.

"What the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor said is extremely true. "

Eternal Dao Ancestor echoed the Dao.

He also noticed the realm of the half-step domain ancestor around the Douzhan platform.

Soon, the Eternal Dao Ancestor discovered that the people who entered the Battle Realm Tower had a black tower mark on their right hands.

He and Lin Tian also had a black tower mark on their right hands.

At the same time, they saw the rules of the competition through the black tower mark on their hands.

They can use their consciousness to sign up for battles by using the Black Tower mark on their right hand to earn points through battles.

In the Battle Tower, the use of points is very great!

Because these points can be exchanged for some precious inheritances, and can also be used to buy some resources!

You must know that in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, a precious inheritance has always been hard to find, but in the Battle Realm Tower, there are many precious inheritances, and you only need to exchange points for them!

Of course, if you want to exchange for inheritance and resources, you need a lot of points!

Even so, it also gave hope to these half-step domain ancestors. If they get a precious inheritance that suits them, maybe they will have the hope of making their strength and cultivation go further! It is even possible to step into the realm of the domain ancestors!

All of a sudden, the Eternal Dao Ancestor could be described as enthusiastic!

Relatively speaking, Ye Tian was very calm, but Ye Tian was also very interested in these inheritances and resources.

With his current inheritance and resources, his cultivation can only enter the ordinary domain ancestor level at most, and if he wants to further his cultivation and strength, he must obtain other inheritances and resources!

It can be said that the inheritance and resources in the Battle Realm Tower are the biggest opportunity he has seen so far!

For this trip to the Battle Boundary Tower, Ye Tian can be said to be inevitable!

"It's a pity, if you want to exchange for precious inheritances and resources, you need too many points, and the more precious the inheritance, the more points you need. "

Eternal Dao Ancestor said regretfully.

After they entered the inside of the War Tower, each person had 100 initial points, of course, they could also sacrifice a large number of resources in exchange for points, but the points were too precious, even if they sacrificed a large number of forbidden strange things, they could only exchange for a small number of points, and these points wanted to be exchanged for precious inheritance, which can be described as a drop in the bucket.

After all, the Dao Mountain Realm and the Xuanxu Ancient Realm are still too backward now, and there are not many precious treasures.

The main thing is that they don't look down on ordinary inheritances and treasures, otherwise they can get a good inheritance by spending all the resources on their bodies.

But what they are looking at are those top-level inheritances, and the points they spend are naturally more.

If you want to get a lot of points, there is only one way, and that is to earn points through the fighting platform!
